name: Mrs Fields Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375°F. Cream together the butter and sugars. Add flour, oat flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda. Mix in chocolate chips and chopped nuts. Drop golf-ball-sized portions of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, about 2 inches apart. Bake for 6 minutes. Makes approximately 112 cookies. To make oat flour: measure out 5 cups of oatmeal, place it in a blender or food processor, and grind until it becomes a fine powder.
